title: zinnia discolor
intro: Zinnia discolor, also known as Mexican zinnia, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, Zinnia discolor has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and promoting overall well-being. Zinnia discolor can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it has also been used in traditional medicine to make poultices and salves for topical application.
